mapper.sql: reservation_id, hotel_id, guest_id, type_id, room_count, total_price, check_in_date, check_out_date, occupied_rooms, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation ( hotel_id, guest_id, type_id, room_count, total_price, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{hotelId}, #{guestId}, #{typeId}, #{roomCount}, #{totalPrice}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET type_id = #{typeId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservation SET check_in_date = #{checkInDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservation SET check_out_date = #{checkOutDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservation SET occupied_rooms = occupied_rooms + 1, WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservation SET occupied_rooms = occupied_rooms - 1, WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE reservation SET is_delete = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM reservation WHERE hotel_id = #{hotelId} and is_delete = 0

SELECT
FROM reservation WHERE reservation_id = #{id} and is_delete = 0
SELECT t.type_name FROM room_type t JOIN reservation r ON r.type_id = t.type_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{id} and r.is_delete = 0

SELECT
FROM reservation WHERE hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND status = #{status} and is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM reservation WHERE guest_id = #{guestId} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT r. FROM reservation r JOIN guest g ON r.guest_id = g.guest_id JOIN room_type t ON r.type_id = t.type_id WHERE g.phone = #{phone} AND r.is_delete = 0 order by r.create_time DESC
